---
title: "Parameter Estimation in Fishery Models"
# date: 2025-06-26
weight: 6
format: html
description: "Parameter Estimation and Identifiability Analysis for Ricker and Beverton-Holt models"
image: "images/parameter_estimation.png" 
categories: ["Simulation", "Profile likelihood", "Bayesian Statistics"]
---


We used simulations, profile likelihood, and Bayesian hierarchical modelling to check the limitations of commonly used fisheries models, such as the Ricker and the Beverton-Holt model.

Stay tuned for more.
